usernames.title: Instagram Usernames
usernames.description: List of Instagram usernames to scrape (without @)

count.title: Number of posts per user
count.description: How many latest video posts to fetch per username (max 12)

includeImages.title: Include image posts too?
includeImages.description: If false, only video/reels are returned

sessionId.title: Instagram Session ID
sessionId.description: Your Instagram sessionid cookie. Required for reliable results on datacenter IPs. Get it from: Chrome → F12 → Application → Cookies → instagram.com → sessionid

sessionIds.title: Multiple Session IDs (for rotation)
sessionIds.description: Add 2-3 Instagram sessionid values for rotation — avoids rate limits when processing many accounts. Example: ["id1", "id2"]

proxyConfig.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfig.description: Apify Proxy settings for avoiding rate limits
